title: Extract MethodSemanticCFG from MethodCFG
description: Pass 4 (build_semantic_graph) should emit a separate MethodSemanticCFG type containing only the semantic graph fields (nodes, edges, clusters, exceptionEdges) plus identity fields (class, method, methodSignature) and children. Remove all semantic graph fields from MethodCFG so that the two types are cleanly separated — MethodCFG holds raw/intermediate pipeline data, MethodSemanticCFG holds the final visualization-ready graph.
close_reason: Completed in commit 4514c66. MethodSemanticCFG extracted as separate type; MethodCFG now holds only raw/intermediate pipeline data.

title: config: add type-checking hooks (mypy/pyright)
description: No mypy/pyright for Python, no spotbugs for Java in pre-commit or CI. Could catch type errors before runtime.

title: fix: add jq prerequisite check in build.sh
description:
**File:** build.sh

E2E tests require jq but build.sh doesn't verify it's installed. Python version check also only warns instead of failing.

title: docs: complete filter.json documentation in README
description:
**File:** README.md lines 209-220

Filter JSON docs don't clarify: precedence when a class matches both allow and stop, whether allow: [] blocks everything, or whether filters work on methods vs class prefixes only.
close_reason: Documented allow/stop precedence, empty-list behavior, and class-prefix-only scope in README

title: security: add dependency vulnerability scanning to build
description: No OWASP plugin or equivalent CVE scanner in Maven build or CI. Consider adding maven-enforcer-plugin or OWASP Dependency-Check.

title: types: replace bare dict hints with TypedDict on key functions
description: `build_semantic_graph_pass(tree: dict)` and `build_dot(root: dict)` accept bare `dict` instead of typed structures. The TypedDicts exist in `ftrace_types.py` — they should be used in function signatures.

title: refactor: deduplicate short_class across two files
description: Identical `short_class()` function in `ftrace_semantic.py:219` and `ftrace_to_dot.py:55`. Extract to `ftrace_types.py` or a shared utils module.

title: fix: weak shell arithmetic comparisons in lib-test.sh
description:
**File:** test-fixtures/lib-test.sh:33

Uses `[ "\$actual" -gt "\$min" ] 2>/dev/null` — if \$actual is non-numeric, comparison fails silently. Use `(( actual > min ))` or validate input.

title: test: add error-case E2E tests
description: No tests for: malformed filter JSON, missing classpath, invalid line numbers, corrupted call graphs. Only happy-path scenarios are covered.

title: test: add unit tests for short_class and escape helpers
description:
Missing unit tests for:
- `short_class()` in `ftrace_semantic.py:219` and `ftrace_to_dot.py:55` (untested in both)
- `escape()` in `ftrace_to_dot.py:51` (untested)
- CLI `main()` functions (no integration tests for argument parsing)

title: refactor: rewrite merge_source_trace with reduce (FP violation)
description:
**File:** python/ftrace_semantic.py:54-65

Uses imperative for loop with dictionary mutations and `.append()`. Sibling `merge_block_stmts()` (line 47) uses `reduce()` — this function should follow the same pattern.

title: config: move E2E tests from pre-commit to CI
description:
**File:** .pre-commit-config.yaml:34-39

Running full E2E suite on every commit is heavyweight. Move E2E to CI and keep only linting + unit tests in pre-commit.

title: refactor: decompose build_dot (129 lines, mutable accumulation)
description:
**File:** python/ftrace_to_dot.py:99-225

Uses mutable `lines` list with 15+ `.append()` calls, `cluster_counter = [0]` hack (should use nonlocal), 102-line nested function. Decompose into: header, method nodes, edges, footer.

title: refactor: decompose build_semantic_graph_pass (265 lines)
description:
**File:** python/ftrace_semantic.py:250-512

265 lines, 5+ responsibilities, 12+ mutable local variables, nested loops with `.append()`, mutable `set` for cycle detection. Only function in pipeline that significantly violates FP constraints. Decompose into: node building, edge building, cluster building, recursion.

title: fix: 2>/dev/null in E2E setup hides command failures
description:
**File:** test-fixtures/lib-test.sh:88-97

Every setup command has `2>/dev/null`. If `buildcg` or `dump` fails, tests proceed with missing/corrupt data — failures only surface as confusing jq errors downstream. Remove stderr suppression from setup().

title: fix: hardcoded user path in Talisman pre-commit hook
description:
**File:** .pre-commit-config.yaml:25

Absolute path `/Users/asgupta/.talisman/bin/talisman_darwin_amd64` breaks on any other machine or CI. Use `$HOME/.talisman/...` or install via package manager.

title: security: upgrade jackson-databind from 2.17.2 to 2.18.x
description:
**File:** java/pom.xml:41

jackson-databind 2.17.2 is outdated. Latest 2.x line is 2.18.x. Upgrade recommended for security patches. No breaking API changes expected.

title: bug: PROCESS_END extracts .lineStart instead of .lineEnd
description:
**File:** test-fixtures/lib-test.sh:103

`PROCESS_END` extracts `.lineStart` instead of `.lineEnd`, making it identical to `PROCESS_LINE`. Any test relying on `PROCESS_END` for range validation is silently testing nothing.

**Fix:** Change `.lineStart` to `.lineEnd` on line 103.
